description_long: This is a small, rectangular handbag with a soft beige body and a wrist strap attached to one side. The front features a zippered pocket with a pastel, watercolor-like pattern in shades of orange, pink, and white, adding a touch of color and visual interest. The main compartment is accessed via a zipper at the top, with the zipper pull visible in several views. The bag appears to be made of a synthetic or faux leather material, with a slightly matte finish and soft, flexible structure. The wrist strap is short and attached at one end, suitable for carrying by hand or on the wrist. There are no visible brand logos or additional decorative elements beyond the patterned front pocket.
description: A small beige handbag with a pastel-patterned front pocket, top zipper closure, and a short wrist strap. The design is simple and functional, with a soft, matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the handbag's slim profile and the wrist strap extending from the top corner.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the pastel-patterned zippered pocket and the main zipper closure at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the thickness of the bag and the attachment point of the wrist strap.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain beige back of the handbag, with the wrist strap and zipper pull visible at the top.
attribute_strap_type: Single short wrist strap, non-adjustable, attached at one end of the bag.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Main zipper closure at the top; additional zipper on the front pocket.
attribute_pattern: Pastel watercolor-like print on the front pocket; main body is solid beige.
